description_long: This object consists of a wooden shelf supporting a group of six bottles and flasks of various shapes and sizes, each with distinct colors and closures. The bottles are made primarily of glass, with some featuring cork stoppers and one topped with a metallic funnel and coiled tube, suggesting a laboratory or alchemical theme. The glass containers display a range of colors, including blue, pink, and orange, with some appearing to contain colored liquids. The shelf is mounted on two black metal brackets, giving it a sturdy, industrial look suitable for urban or workshop environments. The glass surfaces are smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting ambient light. No visible labels or branding are present on any of the bottles.
description: A wooden shelf holds six colorful glass bottles and flasks, some with corks and one with a metal funnel, evoking a laboratory or workshop vibe. The bottles are smooth, glossy, and appear to contain various colored liquids.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six bottles and flasks, with colored liquids and corks clearly visible, and the metal funnel most prominent.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the shelf and the arrangement of bottles, with the blue and pink bottles partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the bottles and the shelf brackets, with the funnel and coiled tube visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the orange and blue bottles more clearly, and the metal funnel from a different angle.
